title: Dylnc Pack
description:
Dylnc pack is a minecraft texturepack made for Crystal PVP. 

read about the content within the pack in the description!
body:
a great texturepack from me (Dylnc) made for CPVP and has a real clean look to it This pack is safe to download and has many awesome features to it!

```
XP bottles are now in the shape of a splash potion.
Stone blocks are now much more lighter and smoother, a perfect cpvp experience.
Totems are now back to what they used to look like.
```

**THIS PACK DOES NOT BLOCK ANY PARTICLES
 NOR DOES IT ALTER THE MINECRAFT FIRE**
